Request Diagnosis

Fit

This work is designed for operators, not optimists.

At a Glance

Role
Independent paid media diagnostician
Pricing Model
Flat fee (no percentage of ad spend)
Minimum Spend Threshold
$10,000+ monthly paid media spend
Scope
Forensic diagnosis of paid advertising systems, incentive alignment, and business outcomes
Confidentiality
NDAs standard. No public reviews or testimonials. Complete discretion.

Strong Fit

You are a strong fit if:

  • Paid media decisions must be defended to leadership, partners, or investors
  • Lead quality is disputed internally
  • Sales performance and marketing reports do not align
  • Budget reallocation decisions carry real financial risk
  • You report to a board, CFO, or PE partners who expect defensible performance data
  • You are personally exposed to board scrutiny, pipeline quality disputes, and budget reallocation decisions

You don't need encouragement. You need accuracy.

Not a Fit

This is not a growth service. This is not creative testing. This is not performance theater.

This work is not a fit if:

  • You want validation for existing decisions
  • You're shopping for a cheaper agency alternative
  • You want tactics without scrutiny
  • You believe dashboards tell the full story
  • You're unwilling to confront uncomfortable findings
  • You need someone to protect prior choices

If clarity feels threatening, we're both wasting our time.

What I Expect

This work requires:

  • Access to real data (not just the flattering parts)
  • Willingness to examine downstream effects beyond the ad account
  • Openness to correction

I don't require agreement. I require honesty.

Minimum Thresholds

Typical minimums:

  • Meaningful monthly ad spend (five figures minimum)
  • Active sales or conversion systems to evaluate
  • Willingness to act on findings

If you're early-stage or still experimenting, this is likely premature.

The Tradeoff

You get: independent judgment, clear findings, no narrative protection.

You give up: comfort, validation of prior decisions, optimism without evidence.

The tradeoff is the point.

Next Steps

  • → Learn who conducts these evaluations
  • → See how diagnosis is conducted
  • → Request a diagnosis

Not a fit? Also a good outcome.

BUT DID YOU WIN

Independent paid media auditor delivering verdicts, not pitches.

  • Diagnosis
  • Execution Support
  • Capability Transfer
